scripts.zip-extension: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Force public/vault-extension.zip -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path vault-extension/background.js,vault-extension/bridge.js,vault-extension/content.js,vault-extension/manifest.json,vault-extension/pdf-lib.min.js,vault-extension/popup.html,vault-extension/popup.js -DestinationPath public/vault-extension.zip; Write-Host 'vault-extension.zip bijgewerkt'"
